'''Orloc''' was a self-proclaimed [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Emperor's Mage]] that claimed to have [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]]. He had a dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and beard, and tawny [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].

==Biography==
As with many other criminals, nothing is known about Orloc's early life and how he came to start his own fake [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Order. What was known was that Orloc was a former [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] masquerading as a [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Prophet of the Dark Side]]. He was also one of the few survivors of the [[Bombardment of Scardia Station|massacre]] performed on the false Prophets by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Afsheen Makati]].<ref name="END">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/88/indexp2.html|text=''Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties''|int=Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties}}</ref>

Following that, Orloc fled to the shadowy [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] of [[Borgo Prime/Legends|Borgo Prime]] where he fell in with criminals and eventually ran his own crime organization. Orloc also had several [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] at his service including a gang of [[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and pirate [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], Orloc learned from an unknown source that the [[Obi-Wan Kenobi's third lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] was kept within [[Bast Castle]] on remote [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]].<ref name="JJK:VF">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]''</ref>

Along with his henchmen, Orloc departed for Vjun. However, upon arriving at the chamber where the [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]] was kept, he encountered the Jedi teacher [[Tionne Solusar]] and her students [[Anakin Solo]], [[Tahiri Veila]], and [[Uldir Lochett]], and the [[Kushiban]] Jedi Master [[Ikrit]]. Orloc claimed to be a Mage that was skilled in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. However, the two parties were not able to agree and a [[Mission to Bast Castle|fight]] broke out. During the confrontation, Orloc's henchmen managed to steal Kenobi's lightsaber.<ref name="JJK:VF" />

In response, the Jedi pursued Orloc and his henchmen on a chase through Bast Castle. During a confrontation, Orloc easily defeated Ikrit in [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] since the Kushiban had no lightsaber at all. He also deceived Uldir by claiming to train him all the Force skills he desired. However, the other Jedi managed to rescue Uldir and escape Bast Castle, along with Kenobi's lightsaber and the [[Asli Krimsan's holocron|holocron]] of the ancient Jedi Master [[Asli Krimsan]].<ref name="JJK:VF" />

Despite having escaped Orloc, Uldir still believed that the Mage would be able to awaken the [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] within him, which nobody at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] had been able to do so. Uldir then stole Ikrit's ship [[Sunrider (starship)|''Sunrider'']] (named after [[Nomi Sunrider]]) and the two Jedi artifacts recovered during the previous adventure at Bast Castle.<ref name="JJK:KB">''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]''</ref>

He eventually found Orloc at an abandoned [[Space station/Legends|space station]] called [[Exis Station/Legends|Exis Station]], where Tionne had met [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] earlier in her search for relics. Having arrived at the derelict space city, Orloc took Uldir as his student. The Mage had already set up his base on the moon and planned to create his own Jedi Order. In reality, Orloc had no Force powers but had actually used high-tech gimmicks to deceive others with demonstrations of so called "Force power". Uldir did not realize it.<ref name="JJK:KB" />

Unfortunately for Orloc, Uldir's Jedi companions Tionne, Ikrit, Anakin and Tahiri set out to find Uldir on their transport ''[[Lore Seeker]]'' and eventually found Exis Station. Having arrived, they tried to tell Uldir that Orloc was a fraud and that he had been deceived. The Mage attacked the four Jedi with his high-tech gimmicks, who fought back by using the Force.<ref name="JJK:KB" />

During the [[Mission to Exis Station|duel]], Orloc wounded Tionne, and Ikrit, who had sworn not to wield a lightsaber until he had found worthy students, made his decision and joined Anakin and Tahiri in their fight. Uldir then saw that Orloc was little more than a charlatan who used technology to deceive others with false demonstrations of Force prowess. Together, the Jedi defeated Orloc. He escaped and was never heard of again.<ref name="JJK:KB" />
